sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35686" key="e)nizeu/gnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνιζεύγνῡμι</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνιδρ-ύω</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνζ-.</foreign> </entryFree>
